prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科组最低位次约5534→5410→5751→4780→5943，整体波动较大，2024年因新增计算机专业大幅前移至4780名，2025年又后移至5943名，近两年波动幅 度超1000名；2025年基准约5943名；2021–2023年均为13人，2024年增至15人，2025年增至17人，呈持续小幅扩招趋势；2026年计划，按趋势估计约19 人，扩招约12%，竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名约第76名，近年排名稳定在76–77名之间，学校层次和声誉保持平稳。；该校为行业特色型211，矿业工程领域具有全国领先地位，报考群体相对稳定；安全科学与工程A+（全国顶尖）、测 绘科学与技术A-、土木工程A-，与该校招生专业中的安全科学与工程类、土木工程等高度对应，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机科学与技术（2024 年新增）2025年最低位次仅2359名，热度极高；传统矿业类专业位次相对靠后；本省2026年物理类考生约30672人，与2025年30457人基本持平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动较大、2026年招生计划预计继续扩招、考生规模基本持平、；考虑学校层次稳定、优势学科吸引力强、计算机专业持续高热，预计竞争略有加剧；预测最低位次约6400名，区间5900–6900名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间5900–6900名内，建议以二档专业（安全科学与工程类、采矿工程）为主攻方向，一档专业（计算机科学与技术、智能采矿工程）作为冲刺，三档专业（土木工程 、化学工程与工艺、地质类）作为保底。位次明显优于5900名可重点冲刺计算机科学与技术。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 5534 → 5410 → 5751 → 4780 → 5943, showing significant fluctuations overall. In 2024, due to the addition of a computer science major, the ranking advanced sharply to 4780, but in 2025 it fell back to 5943, with a fluctuation range of over 1000 places in the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 5943. Enrollment was 13 from 2021 to 2023, increased to 15 in 2024, and further increased to 17 in 2025, showing a continuous slight expansion trend. For 2026, based on the trend, the estimated enrollment is about 19, an expansion of about 12%, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, it ranks approximately 76th, with stable rankings between 76 and 77 in recent years, maintaining a steady level and reputation. As an industry-specific 211 university, it holds a nationally leading position in the field of mining engineering, with a relatively stable applicant pool. Safety Science and Engineering is A+ (top in the country), Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology is A-, and Civil Engineering is A-, which highly correspond to the university's enrollment majors such as Safety Science and Engineering and Civil Engineering, strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science and Technology (newly added in 2024) had a minimum ranking of only 2359 in 2025, indicating extremely high popularity. Traditional mining-related majors have relatively lower rankings. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in this province is approximately 30,672, basically unchanged from 30,457 in 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant fluctuations in historical rankings, the expected continued expansion of enrollment in 2026, the basically stable number of candidates, the stable university level, strong appeal of advantageous disciplines, and the sustained high popularity of computer science, competition is expected to intensify slightly. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 6400, with a range of 5900 to 6900.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 5900–6900, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Safety Science and Engineering, Mining Engineering) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Computer Science and Technology, Intelligent Mining Engineering) as a reach, and Tier 3 majors (Civil Engineering, Chemical Engineering and Technology, Geology) as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than 5900, you can prioritize Computer Science and Technology as a reach.
